global.description: The ad features a vibrant layout promoting food delivery with a clear discount message.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with a discount offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A solid color background occupying the top portion of the ad, providing a vibrant backdrop for the text.

elements.label: Food item display
elements.description: A visual representation of two food items displayed in a simplistic, outlined style, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Food item display
elements.description: Another visual representation of food items, similar to the previous element, also centered in the ad.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Hungry? We got you' positioned at the bottom of the ad, conveying the main message.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Fresh favorites nearby -30% Shop now

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'SnapMeal' displayed in a prominent, bold font at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Sale indicator
elements.description: A small, circular badge in the top right corner with the text 'SALE' in bold, contrasting color.
